chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-719 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.2948/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 4. 3. For orders on Misc. No.2949/2026. 4. For orders on Misc. No.2950/2026. 5. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2026. Petitioner is present in person. --------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. The Petitioner professes to be aggrieved by an Order dated 10.01.2026 made by the learned 1st Senior Civil Judge, Malir, Karachi in Civil Suit No.3499/2025, however, has directly invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, rather than availing the remedies available to him under the CPC. As such, the Petition appears to be misconceived and stands dismissed accordingly, alongwith pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
